title: [TASK] Build NavigationMenu component with TanStack Router links and i18n labels

conversation_log.summary: Task is architecturally consistent. File location (apps/frontend/src/components/layout/NavigationMenu.tsx), naming conventions (PascalCase .tsx file, PascalCase named export, kebab-case folders), technology choices (MUI primitives, TanStack Router <Link>, react-i18next useTranslation), styling approach (MUI sx prop only), and i18n pattern all align with architecture.md. Note: the canonical structure in architecture.md does not yet list a components/ directory under apps/frontend/src/; this is an additive, non-conflicting addition. architecture.md should be updated to reflect the components/layout/ directory once the layout components (from #31 and this task) land — this should be tracked as part of an architectural update task if not already covered.

All 9 acceptance criteria are testable as written. Each criterion is binary and specific. Criteria 1, 6, 7, 8, 9 are verifiable by static file inspection. Criteria 3, 4, 5 are verifiable by Vitest + React Testing Library unit tests. Criterion 2 is verifiable by running tsc --noEmit and checking exit code. No vague, subjective, or immeasurable criteria found.

Blocked by unmerged dependencies. Task #31 (BaseLayout) has not been implemented — apps/frontend/src/components/layout/BaseLayout.tsx does not exist. Task #33 (MUI installation) has not been completed — @mui/material, @emotion/react, and @emotion/styled are absent from apps/frontend/package.json. Both blockers must be resolved before implementation of NavigationMenu can proceed.

Implemented NavigationMenu component with MUI List/ListItemButton primitives, TanStack Router <Link> via component prop, and react-i18next labels. Added nav.home and nav.test keys to common.json. Integrated <NavigationMenu /> into BaseLayout in a flex-row layout alongside <Outlet />. PR #39 opened.

31/32 tests pass across AC1, AC3–AC9. AC2 fails: npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 2. However the 3 TypeScript errors are all pre-existing in src/orpc-client.ts and src/routes/test.tsx — files not touched by this PR's diff. None of the errors originate in NavigationMenu.tsx or the updated BaseLayout.tsx. The failures are: TS2344 in orpc-client.ts (ContractProcedure/NestedClient constraint mismatch), TS2349 and TS7006 in test.tsx (non-callable ContractProcedure and missing type annotation). These pre-existed before Task #35 work began and are unrelated to the NavigationMenu implementation. Flagging to developer for clarification on whether AC2 should be evaluated against pre-existing baseline or strictly as written.

All 32/32 tests pass across all 9 acceptance criteria. AC2 now passes: npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 0. The PR diff includes a fix to src/orpc-client.ts (adding ContractRouterClient<AppRouter> type parameter) that resolved the previously reported TypeScript errors. No test interpretation assumptions required — all criteria map directly to their tests.

risks: The component={Link} polymorphic prop on MUI ListItemButton may surface TypeScript generic constraint warnings with certain MUI/TanStack Router version combinations. If tsc --noEmit flags this, the fallback is to nest <Link> as a child of ListItemButton instead.
Active-link highlighting is out of scope; the nav renders identically regardless of current route.
